message:
test(ftui-extras): improve syntax.rs test coverage for tokenizer edge cases (bd-2u0zl)

Add 70 edge case tests covering string continuation/escapes, number scanning
(hex, underscores, suffixes), block comment state transitions, attribute
parsing, operator/delimiter recognition, UTF-8 punctuation, DiffTokenizer
line prefixes, TokenizedText incremental updates, registry overrides,
LineState/StringKind/CommentKind variant coverage, and cross-language
comment delimiter behavior (Haskell, Lua, HTML, Mermaid, Python, CSS).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
